recommendations.title: The Pick-up Artist
recommendations.overview: A womanizer meets his match when he falls for the daughter of a gambling addict who is in debt to the mob.

recommendations.title: Danny Collins
recommendations.overview: An ageing hard-living 1970s rock star decides to change his life when he discovers a 40-year-old undelivered letter written to him by John Lennon.

recommendations.title: Dial M for Murder
recommendations.overview: When her American lover visits London, a wealthy woman’s jealous husband hatches a plan to murder her and inherit her fortune.

recommendations.title: Bad Lieutenant
recommendations.overview: While investigating a young nun's rape, a corrupt New York City police detective, with a serious drug and gambling addiction, tries to change his ways and find forgiveness.

recommendations.title: Casino
recommendations.overview: In Las Vegas, two best friends--a casino executive and a Mafia enforcer--compete for a gambling empire and a fast-living, fast-loving socialite.

recommendations.title: Win It All
recommendations.overview: A gambling addict faces a conflict when entrusted with keeping a bunch of money that isn't his.

recommendations.title: Bay of Angels
recommendations.overview: A bank clerk is drawn into the risky world of a gorgeous gambling addict.

recommendations.title: Girl Most Likely
recommendations.overview: A failed New York playwright stages a suicide in an attempt to win back her ex, only to wind up in the custody of her gambling-addict mother.

recommendations.title: Seven Chances
recommendations.overview: Struggling stockbroker Jimmie Shannon learns that, if he gets married by 7 p.m. on his 27th birthday -- which is today -- he'll inherit $7 million from an eccentric relative.

recommendations.title: Christmas Inheritance
recommendations.overview: To inherit her father's company, socialite Ellen must first visit his small hometown, where she learns the value of hard work and helping others.
